creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #0)
> I'd like to take maintainership but... only when 1.21.0 is released

To be accurate, I was planning to throw everything away and start form current -devel port. Having xwayland depend on xorg-server, a dumping ground for non-upstreamable patches, lots of cruft, autotools, non-declarative style and users ready to crucify you, is not fun.
